source_pr.title: executor: support index lookup merge join in executor.
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->
A sub PR for https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/9571

### What is changed and how it works?
Support index merge join in executor.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test
 - Integration test

Code changes

 - Has exported function/method change
 - Has exported variable/fields change
 - Has interface methods change
 - Has persistent data change

Side effects

 - Possible performance regression
 - Increased code complexity

symptoms: Go race detector reports a DATA RACE in index lookup merge join when multiple inner workers run concurrently and share mutable range state.
failure_signature: DATA RACE detected under `-race`, involving concurrent access to shared join range state (e.g. `indexRanges`) across inner-worker goroutines in index lookup merge join.
root_cause_explanation: The flakiness is due to a real concurrency data race: index lookup merge join runs multiple inner workers concurrently, and previously they could share/mutate join range state (e.g. `indexRanges`) across goroutines. The PR stabilizes it by copying the index ranges for each worker so concurrent execution does not race on shared mutable state.
fix_pattern: Do not share mutable join/task state across concurrent workers: deep-copy per-worker ranges/slices/structs so goroutines don't race on shared data.

evidence: evidence: fix data race | tk.MustQuery("select /*+ TIDB_INLJ(t, s) */ t.a from t left join s on t.a = s.a order by t.a desc").Check(testkit.Rows("148307968", "-277544960", "-277544960", "-1327693824")) (executor/join_test.go)

files: planner/core/logical_plan_builder.go, executor/builder.go, executor/index_lookup_merge_join.go, planner/core/exhaust_physical_plans.go, planner/core/physical_plans.go, executor/join_test.go, executor/index_lookup_join.go, planner/core/cbo_test.go, cmd/explaintest/r/explain_complex.result, cmd/explaintest/r/explain_complex_stats.result, cmd/explaintest/r/explain_easy.result, cmd/explaintest/r/generated_columns.result, cmd/explaintest/r/index_join.result, cmd/explaintest/r/topn_push_down.result, cmd/explaintest/r/tpch.result, cmd/explaintest/r/explain_easy_stats.result, cmd/explaintest/r/subquery.result, executor/index_lookup_join_test.go, go.sum, planner/core/initialize.go, planner/core/logical_plan_test.go, planner/core/physical_plan_test.go, planner/core/stringer.go, planner/core/task.go, util/ranger/ranger_test.go, cmd/explaintest/r/access_path_selection.result, cmd/explaintest/r/black_list.result, cmd/explaintest/r/explain.result, cmd/explaintest/r/explain_stats.result, cmd/explaintest/r/partition_pruning.result, cmd/explaintest/r/select.result, cmd/explaintest/r/topn_pushdown.result, cmd/explaintest/r/window_function.result, log.txt, executor/benchmark_test.go, planner/core/testdata/plan_suite_out.json
